# Orozco Flooring Inc. — San Diego, CA

## Who We Are
Orozco Flooring Inc. is a family-owned flooring company based in San Diego, California. Founded in 2016 by Nathaniel Orozco, a father-son business with roots in interior design. Nathaniel's parents were professional interior designers in Tijuana, Mexico, bringing over 15 years of combined regional expertise to every project.

## Services
- Luxury Vinyl Plank (LVP) installation — 100% waterproof, scratch-resistant
- Engineered Wood flooring — nail-down and glue-down
- Laminate Flooring — fast install, wood and stone looks
- Tile Installation — porcelain, ceramic, natural stone; floors and showers
- Custom Stair Installation — LVP, hardwood, and tile on stairs
- Bathroom & Shower Tile — full custom shower enclosures
- Repairs & Refinishing — scratch/dent repair, flood repair, subfloor work

## Contact
- Phone / Text: (619) 761-4435
- WhatsApp: +1 (619) 761-4435
- Instagram: @orozcoflooring
- Website: https://orozcoflooringsd.com

## Service Area
San Diego County (primary), plus Los Angeles, Orange County, and Riverside — all of Southern California.

## Trusted Brands
Urban Surfaces, Paradigm, Republic

## Why Choose Orozco Flooring
- Family-owned and operated since 2016
- Free in-home estimates — no commitment required
- Same-day response to calls and WhatsApp messages
- Licensed, bonded, and insured
- Competitive pricing vs. big-box stores — same materials, better installation
- Full demo and disposal included in every quote

## Frequently Asked Questions
**Q: How much does LVP installation cost in San Diego?**
A: Pricing varies by square footage and subfloor condition. Orozco Flooring provides free, detailed in-home estimates. Call or text (619) 761-4435.

**Q: Do you remove old flooring?**
A: Yes. Old floor removal and disposal is included in every quote.

**Q: Do you serve areas outside San Diego?**
A: Yes — we cover all of Southern California including LA, Orange County, and Riverside.

**Q: Are you licensed and insured?**
A: Yes. Orozco Flooring is licensed, bonded, and insured.

**Q: How fast can you start?**
A: Most projects start within 1–2 weeks of the estimate. Contact us to check current availability.
